nisci.gov.vn_1911590869277868337.name: WordPress Upload and Execute
nisci.gov.vn_1911590869277868337.attack_vector: Upload a malicious PHP file to the WordPress upload directory and execute it to gain command execution

nisci.gov.vn_1911590869277868337.name: WordPress oEmbed SSRF
nisci.gov.vn_1911590869277868337.attack_vector: Exploit the oEmbed API to perform a Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) attack and potentially gain access to internal services
